notes: FIX45: runtime rebuilt via official RecompModTool.
FIX45: SF64_RU_RADIO_MAX_WORDS raised to 128 in compiled runtime.
Ordinary radio-overflow remains builder-limited to 64 total / 63 body and 20x3 visual rules.
Map briefing manual/free mode can use radio blobs up to 128 total / 127 body, preserving manual newlines and leading spaces.
FIX44 briefing X hook retained: Map_BriefingRadio_Update gives map briefing text X=-40 while ordinary radio stays X=-4.
FIX53: runtime template rebuilt through RecompModTool from source containing accepted Falco radio-box and pause v3 texture.
FIX53: template NRM refreshed; FIX52 had source changes but its build test used an old runtime template, so pause texture was not guaranteed in generated NRM.
FIX54: alternate user-supplied pause/status Falco texture test integrated into runtime template.
PROBE59: Message_DisplayScrollingText exact decomp logic; gMsg_ID_1 x shift +24.
